name: ViewInfo
summary: Represents the name and orientation of a View (and named view). views can be thought of as cameras.

constructors.name: ViewInfo(RhinoViewport)
constructors.summary: Access to the ViewInfo for given RhinoViewport

constructors.name: ViewInfo(UInt32)
constructors.summary: Construct the ViewInfo for active viewport of given doc.

params.name: docRuntimeSerialNumber
params.doc: Runtime serial number of the document to query for the active viewport

methods.name: ClippingPlaneSurfaces
methods.summary: Returns a list of ClippingPlaneSurfaces for this view.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

properties.name: ClippingPlanesIds
properties.summary: Returns a list of clipping plane Ids associated with this view.

properties.name: FocalBlurAperture
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Focal blur aperture of the active viewport

properties.name: FocalBlurDistance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Focal blur distance of the active viewport

properties.name: FocalBlurJitter
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Focal blur jitter of the active viewport

properties.name: FocalBlurMode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Focal blur mode of the active viewport

properties.name: FocalBlurSampleCount
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Focal blur sample count of the active viewport

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the view.

properties.name: NamedViewId
properties.summary: Returns a unique id if this is a named view otherwise an empty Guid.

properties.name: SectionBehavior
properties.summary: How a view will interact with clipping planes

properties.name: ShowWallpaperInGrayScale
properties.summary: True if wallpaper (if any) is to be shown in gray scale in this view.

properties.name: Viewport
properties.summary: Gets the viewport, or viewing frustum, associated with this view.

properties.name: WallpaperFilename
properties.summary: Get filename for wallpaper set to this view, if any.

properties.name: WallpaperHidden
properties.summary: True if wallpaper (if any) is to be hidden from this view.
